category_title: Students with low academic achievement engaging in reflective knowledge-building discourse
scenario_title: Addressing low self-efficacy and interaction gaps in online discourse
minimal_context: The student is analyzing their Knowledge Connection Analyzer data on the Knowledge Forum to evaluate their collaboration and plan improvements.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at your KCA data and the task sheet to analyze the question 'Are we a community that collaborates?'

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can see my deficiencies. For example, reading others' notes, I have read many notes, the percentage is 99% which is pretty high.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do the other percentages show?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: When I look at built-on to others' notes, the percentage is only about 20%, which is pretty low. My notes have been read a lot, but built on less.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I need to communicate more with peers, but my notes lack thought-provoking questions. I am not happy with the quality of my notes, and I am afraid that my point or idea is not good enough.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at your KCA data and the task sheet to analyze the question 'Are we a community that collaborates?'

STUDENT: I can see my deficiencies. For example, reading others' notes, I have read many notes, the percentage is 99% which is pretty high.

TUTOR: What do the other percentages show?

STUDENT: When I look at built-on to others' notes, the percentage is only about 20%, which is pretty low. My notes have been read a lot, but built on less.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: I need to communicate more with peers, but my notes lack thought-provoking questions. I am not happy with the quality of my notes, and I am afraid that my point or idea is not good enough.

task.content: Analyzing KCA data regarding the question 'Are we a community that collaborates?' and planning improvements
task.learning_goal: generate useful knowledge building goals including synthesizing ideas and improving ideas collectively

context.materials: Knowledge Connection Analyzer (KCA) data, KCA task sheet, reflection journal
context.time_context: After working on the Knowledge Forum database for approximately 3 weeks

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Analyzing KCA data to evaluate the impact and quality of their individual notes
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: identified the gaps ( 'have read many notes;' 'the percentage of my response to others is only about 20%, which is pretty low;...built-on... the percentage is only about 20%, which is pretty low;' 'the interaction between the other students and me is not sufficient' )
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: afraid that my point or idea is not good enough
related_quotes: I have read many notes, the percentage is 99% which is pretty high . However, when I look at built-on to others ’ notes, the percentage is only about 20%, which is pretty low
I even write notes at home , because I am afraid that my point or idea is not good enough ...

behavior_patterns.condition: reflecting on the quality of their own notes
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: identified the problems that were ( 'my notes have been read a lot, but built on less;' 'no notes are referred;' 'lack thought-provoking questions' )
behavior_patterns.internal_state: not happy with the quality of my notes
related_quotes: My notes lack thought-provoking questions . I am not happy with the quality of my notes; it has much room to be improved.
